_comment: Plugins required for Sinister Sanctum to function. Operator-curated allowlist. Per OPERATOR-DIRECTIVES.md 2026-05-19 plugin-discipline doctrine: do not auto-install ANYTHING outside this allowlist. Author: RKOJ-ELENO :: 2026-05-23

required.name: understand-anything
required.purpose: loads architectural context on cold-start (CLAUDE.md cold-start protocol)

recommended.name: code-review
recommended.purpose: PR review helper for shipping work

notes: Add to required[] only when a plugin is truly necessary for Sanctum cold-start to work. Recommended[] is operator-decision; check script lists but does not auto-install.
